response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of broad software development experience and strong full-stack technical depth, but the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership tenure, no developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure ownership at the scale this role demands, and no mobile-platform ecosystem experience. The role is a people-leadership position requiring 2+ years managing engineers and 3+ years building developer tools, neither of which is evidenced.
strengths: 20+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Teaching/workshop track record (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals) signals mentoring aptitude
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed
Lacks dedicated developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure role at organizational scale
No mobile-platform ecosystem (iOS/Android tooling) experience beyond a brief 2008 app stint

key_factors.factor: Deep engineering craftsmanship and teaching background
